description: Authorize an approved PayPal order for delayed capture

authorize_order.description: Authorize the order after buyer approval

reauthorize.description: Reauthorize an expired or partially captured authorization

amount.description: Omit for full capture. Provide for partial capture.

fields.value: Amount to capture (up to authorization amount)

final_capture.description: Set to false to allow multiple partial captures

authorization_lifecycle.authorization_period: 29 days — extended period (not guaranteed after honor period)
authorization_lifecycle.reauthorization: Available after original authorization expires or for amount changes
authorization_lifecycle.void: Available anytime before capture to release the hold

when_to_use: Need to adjust amount before capture
Buy online, pick up in store (BOPIS)
important_notes: Authorization holds funds but does not transfer them
Honor period is 3 days — capture within this window when possible
After 3 days, funds hold is not guaranteed but capture can still be attempted
Partial captures: set final_capture=false for all but the last capture
Void releases the authorization hold — cannot capture after void
